name: Favorite Chili Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons Whole Allspice (tied in a bag)
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and chop the sweet red peppers.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
3. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and let cool before using or storing.
